locked_interpretation: V30 converts the V29 MD-readiness block into a practical acquisition sprint: local target-specific couplings/constraints are scanned, missing constraint layers are made explicit, and XCL1/KcsA are selected for the next external-constraint import/preflight step. No MD or folding claim is allowed.

next_acquisition_decision.reason: V29 shows coherent mechanism operators but no target is MD-ready. XCL1 needs state-specific external constraints/condition context; KcsA needs coupling/interface support and expanded assembly coordinates. The next sprint should import or build external constraint sources, not run MD.
